pages.title: What is the Path of Artifice?
pages.text: $(o)"Five vows, etched in steel."$()$(br2)The Path of Artifice forges $(l)one piece of gear$() through 5 sequential stages. Each stage writes data to the gear's NBT $(l)permanently$() — no stage can be removed or reset (short of destroying the item).

pages.title: The Five Stages
pages.text: $(6)E. Crucible$() — base elemental aspect (24 named)$(br)$(b)B. Resonance$() — inlaid sockets (max 4)$(br)$(5)A. Soul$() — slain mob echoes (max 3)$(br)$(a)C. Experience$() — auto-accumulated tiers (max 3)$(br)$(d)D. Celestial$() — ultimate crown (16 named)$(br2)Together they form the gear's $(l)tier 0..5$() — visible in the tooltip.

pages.title: Iron Rules
pages.text: 1. $(l)E must come first$() — every other stage requires the Crucible to be done.$(br)2. $(l)Order is otherwise free$() — B/A/C/D may be tackled in any order.$(br)3. $(l)Append-only$() — sockets, echoes, tiers can only grow; aspect & blessing are written once.$(br)4. $(l)Eligibility$() — only damageable gear (weapons, tools, armor) can enter the pipeline.

pages.title: What goes into combat?
pages.text: After all 5 stages are written, $(l)R87 Battle Integration$() reads the NBT on every $(l)LivingHurtEvent$():$(br2)Attacker side: aspect × sharpness × matching echoes × tier × blessing × spark crit, then $(l)leech$() heals.$(br)Defender side: ward + half-tier + blessing reduction, capped at $(l)75%$() reduction.

pages.title: Permanence as Identity
pages.text: The pipeline is irreversible by design. A weapon you forge $(l)becomes you$() — your kills, your choices, your aspect. There is no respec.$(br2)$(o)Build wisely. Forge once.$()

pages.title: Continue Reading
pages.text: Each stage has its own entry:$(br)· $(l)E. Aspect Crucible$()$(br)· $(l)B. Resonance Inlay$()$(br)· $(l)A. Soul Inscription$()$(br)· $(l)C. Experience Awakening$()$(br)· $(l)D. Celestial Coronation$()$(br)· $(l)Battle Integration$()
